display.purpose: Page titles — max one per view.

headline.purpose: Section headers, kanban lanes, stat banners.

title.purpose: Card titles, table headers, experiment names.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Bold-card hover only — never at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Bold-card transitions — 0.15–0.18s on box-shadow, border-color, transform.

components.name: Staff Nav Tab
components.description: Active tab in the dark admin top bar.
components.css: .ds-nav-staff { background: #111318; height: 54px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-nav-staff-link { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 54px; padding: 0 14px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,.45); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-staff-link--active { color: #fff; border-bottom-color: #2f9e44; } .ds-nav-staff-link:hover { color: #fff; }

components.name: Client Nav Pill
components.description: Active navigation item in the light client header.
components.css: .ds-nav-client { background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-nav-client-link { display: inline-block; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #868e96; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-client-link--active { color: #228be6; background: #e7f5ff; } .ds-nav-client-link:hover { color: #228be6; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Staff primary action — lab green fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2f9e44; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #28913d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f9e44; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-status-badge--progress { background: #fff4e6; color: #c04a00; }

components.name: Experiment Card
components.description: Kanban experiment card — flat at rest, bordered.
components.html:
Polycarbonate tensile test
Requested
Updated 2026-06-20 14:32
components.css: .ds-exp-card { display: block; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-exp-card:hover { border-color: #ced4da; } .ds-exp-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #212529; } .ds-exp-card-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #868e96; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-status-badge--requested { background: #e7f5ff; color: #1864ab; }

components.name: Bold Card
components.description: Catalog/onboarding pick card with top accent bar and hover lift.
components.html:
PET bottle resin
→
components.css: .ds-bold-card { position: relative; display: block; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; text-decoration: none; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.18s, border-color 0.18s, transform 0.18s; } .ds-bold-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2f9e44, #51cf66); opacity: 0.25; transition: opacity 0.18s; } .ds-bold-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-color: #b2f2bb; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-bold-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-bold-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #212529; } .ds-bold-card-arrow { display: inline-block; transition: transform 0.15s; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-bold-card:hover .ds-bold-card-arrow { transform: translateX(3px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="search" placeholder="Search experiment or context ID…" aria-label="Search experiments" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; max-width: 340px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px; background: #fff; color: #212529; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #868e96; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #228be6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(34,139,230,0.15); }

components.name: Admin Group Banner
components.description: Clickable stat tile for filtering experiment groups.
components.css: .ds-group-banner { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; padding: 16px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: #1864ab; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; min-width: 140px; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-group-banner:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-group-banner-count { font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; } .ds-group-banner-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-group-banner-sub { font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.75; margin-top: 2px; }

narrative.overview: ChemFox is a workflow instrument, not a brochure. Visual hierarchy follows experiment lifecycle: where a sample is, who owns it, and what happens next should read faster than any decorative chrome. The system builds on Mantine 9 defaults for forms, inputs, and density, then layers two deliberate registers — a light client shell (blue active states, white body) and a dark staff shell (charcoal nav, green accent) — that still feel like one product.
keyCharacteristics: Status color is semantic and reserved — lifecycle hues never double as brand decoration.
Staff brand green appears on admin nav, bold cards, and primary lab actions.
Client surfaces use Mantine blue for navigation active states.
Cards and tables carry data; borders and muted fills separate groups.
Custom bold-card CSS extends Mantine for catalog hover affordances — use sparingly.

rules.name: The Status-Color Rule
rules.body: Lifecycle colors communicate ticket state only. Never use status yellow or red as marketing accent.

rules.name: The Two-Shell Rule
rules.body: Client routes use light header + blue active nav. Staff routes use dark header + green active underline.

rules.name: The System-Font Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a second geometric sans for personality.

rules.name: The No Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair a 1px border with a wide soft shadow on the same resting element.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to hover or isolated auth containment.

dos: Do lead every list and board view with status — badge, lane, or banner before secondary metadata.
Do use Mantine spacing scale and components before inventing custom layout primitives.
Do keep staff green for brand moments and primary lab actions; keep lifecycle colors for ticket state.
Do use bold-card / bold-row hover language consistently when building catalog or admin list affordances.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion alternatives when adding custom transitions beyond Mantine defaults.
donts: Don't use consumer / playful UI — rounded blobs, mascot illustrations, gamification, celebration confetti, or fun empty states that undermine lab credibility.
Don't use generic SaaS marketing patterns — cream hero backgrounds, gradient text, eyebrow kickers on every section, identical icon-card grids.
Don't use legacy enterprise gray — tiny muted text, modal-heavy flows, tables that bury status.
Don't use dark neon / cyberpunk tool aesthetic — decorative glow, high-chroma accents everywhere, glassmorphism as default.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't nest cards inside cards — use spacing and muted lane backgrounds to group instead.
Don't apply bold-card hover lift to dense data tables or form fields.
